    People also ask
    What is the cost of interior woodwork in Bangalore?
    Mid-range interiors using branded plywood, MDF, and premium laminates generally fall between ₹1,300 and ₹1,800 per square foot. High-end carpentry involving marine plywood, veneer finishes, solid wood, and custom designs can cost ₹2,000 to ₹2,500 or more per square foot.10 Feb 2026

    What is the average charge per hour for a carpenter?
    Typical hourly rates for carpenters

    Newly qualified carpenter: £10 – £20 per hour. Experienced carpenter: £20 – £40 per hour. Highly specialised carpenter: £40+ per hour. Company contractor: Charges may be a bit higher than a fully self-employed carpenter due to the company's overheads.    30 Aug 2024

    What is the salary of carpenter in Bangalore?
    The average carpenter gross salary in Bangalore, India is ₹7,63,581 or an equivalent hourly rate of ₹367. This is 13% higher (+₹86,246) than the average carpenter salary in India. In addition, they earn an average bonus of ₹22,220.

    What are the three types of carpenters?
    Types of Carpentry in Construction
    • Rough Carpentry / Framer. Rough carpenters focus on the “rough” framing of a building. ...
    • Finish Carpenter. If rough carpenters build the skeleton, then finish carpenters build the nervous system. ...
    • Trim Carpenter. ...
    • Cabinetmaking. ...
    • Formwork Carpenter. ...
    • Cornice Carpenter. ...
    • Green Carpenter. ...
